title: The Model Landscape
summary: Text, vision, speech, image, video - and several major providers. Learn the model families, who builds what, and how to think about capability, speed, and cost.

context.headline: A zoo of models, a map to read it
context.description: There is no single 'AI' - there are families of models specialized for text, images, speech, and video, built by a handful of major providers. This closing module maps that landscape and gives you vocabulary for placing products, providers, and headlines in context.
context.when: The players and the trade-offs, as of today
